name: 50 SHADES OF NOAH GREY
author: Sean McCormick
description: Pure greyscale photography skin. Three monochrome variants with zero colour accents.

options.IBM Plex Sans: IBM Plex Sans (Neutral Grotesk / IBM DNA)
options.Public Sans: Public Sans (US Web Design System / Precise)
options.Bebas Neue: Bebas Neue (Bold Industrial / All Caps only)
options.Space Grotesk: Space Grotesk (Quirky Tech / Space Mono cousin)
options.Orbitron: Orbitron (Pure Sci-Fi / Use boldly or not at all)
options.Cormorant Garamond: Cormorant Garamond (Fine Serif / Pairs with Cinzel)
options.DM Serif Display: DM Serif Display (High Contrast / Luxury editorial)
options.DM Serif Text: DM Serif Text (Body-weight companion to DM Serif Display)
options.EB Garamond: EB Garamond (Classic Garamond / Timeless book type)
options.Crimson Pro: Crimson Pro (Book Quality / Refined long text)
options.IM Fell DW Pica: IM Fell DW Pica (Hand-Press / Old-Style Roughness)
options.Ultra: Ultra (Slab Serif / Extreme weight / Display only)
options.Alfa Slab One: Alfa Slab One (Heavy Slab / Display only)
options.Roboto Slab: Roboto Slab (Material Design Slab / Pairs with DM Sans)
options.Josefin Slab: Josefin Slab (Art Deco Slab / Vintage poster)
